C[TheBellman: At this point, I think D3 was slow but that the P7 R11 exchange was a mistake for black
C[TheBellman: I was happy to play Q2 but then I felt I needed to demure at R3 because of cut aji, though the cut makes P7 a slightly better move
C[TheBellman: My framework here is smaller but thicker than white's. To respond at K16 would be uninspiring, and if L17 white will force at M16 etc.
C[TheBellman: I feel good as black but I am not sure how to play on the left.
C[TheBellman: If I can leave this fight on the left, I really want S15...
TheBellman: Unless R13 is a vital point
